content.en:
"Do you want to pass on your own disciples?"

Ye Tian was thinking.

Originally, he didn't care about any named disciple or official disciple status, but if he became a personal disciple of Qilin Allah, he could obtain many precious inheritances and treasure resources.

Qilin Allah cannot enter the universe, but this Qilin Hall alone definitely has many resources, and if he fully assists him in his cultivation, his strength can definitely be quickly improved.

"Why don't you become the personal disciple of Allah that Kirin first?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he said, "Okay, I agree!"

"Okay, I'll inform the master Qilin Allah! In the universe, it takes a huge price to inform the master Qilin Allah in the chaos, and let the master come to the projection, but you are enough to make the master pay these costs! When the master projection comes, you have to respect! The master is the supreme existence of the Great Dao realm, and it belongs to a hegemon in the chaos!"

Qilin Hall Instrument Spirit said.

"Great Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian's heart was even more contemptuous.

The master of the inheritance in the Chaos God Realm is the Merge Dao realm, and they are all strong in the Merge Dao realm, and the mere Dao realm is just an ant in front of that person.

However, he was not qualified to be disrespectful to that Dao powerhouse now.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded lightly, and it was a response.

Then, the spirit began to communicate with Allah in the chaos with a treasure.

About three days passed, and a ray of phantage appeared in the void.

At the same time, the Qilin Hall was shaking.

"Cosmic Origin!"

Ye Tian sensed the aura of the Universe Origin, it was obvious that the Universe Origin was trying to impact the Qilin Hall, but unfortunately the current Universe Origin was suppressed, and the mobilized power was limited, and there was no way to help the Qilin Hall, let alone organize the projection of the Qilin Allah.

"Master!"

Seeing this phantom, the machine spirit hurriedly said respectfully.

The Qilin Allah Phantom did not care about the spirit, but looked at Ye Tian.

"You are very good, qualified to be my personal disciple!"

Allah said in a commanding tone.

The next moment, he took out a piece of jade talisman and said: "This is my jade talisman, if you hold it, it means that you are my disciple, and other great powers will know your identity when they see you in the future, and they will not give me face! Of course, if you want to formally apprentice, you must first transcend, enter chaos, and then come to my Qilin Palace, and I will really accept you as an apprentice!"

But just when the jade talisman was about to touch Ye Tian, a wave of turmoil opened.

"No!"

Allah is terrified.

In the next moment, his projection shattered, and the jade talisman also turned into nothingness.

Ye Tian was stunned, and the machine spirit was also stunned.

......

Chaos.

In the Qilin Palace, Qilin Allah showed horror on his face, he sensed that his projection was extinguished, the projection is not powerful, otherwise it will not enter the universe, but his projection is not something that others can extinguish if they want to, in the universe, no one can extinguish his projection, unless it is the strongest rule power beyond the universe.

But just now, his supreme rule force instantly annihilated his projection.

"Mighty !! of the Way"

Allah was shocked and terrified.

Although he is a strong person in the Great Dao realm, he has only just entered the Great Dao realm, and he belongs to the weak category in the Great Dao realm, and the powerful breath of the Merge Dao realm is enough to kill him.

Airplanes!!!!

The Chaos Supreme Rule descended, and a wisp of phantom appeared in front of his eyes.

"Allah, the young man you saw in the universe is my reserve official disciple, do you want to rob the disciple for this seat?"

The mysterious phantom stared at him with eyes overlooking the ants, and said.

"Adult, villain dare!"

Allah bent down and bowed his head in fear.

"Humph!"

With a cold snort, the mysterious phantom dissipated.

But Allah trembled and fell all at once.

"I actually robbed the disciple with that existence, it's too dangerous, fortunately that existence didn't care, otherwise I would have died!"

He didn't even dare to mention the name of that being, it was a supreme existence in the realm of merger!

----------

In the Qilin Palace.

Ye Tian saw that the Qilin Allah had not appeared for a long time, and he knew that it was hopeless to worship the teacher.

"Could it be that the Qilin Allah happened to have an accident in the chaos, or maybe ......?"

Ye Tian also had a guess, just now he seemed to feel a terrifying power.

"Isn't it ......"

He thought of the great existence of the Chaos God Realm, maybe the other party knew, after all, he had become the official disciple of the reserve of that great existence, and if he became a disciple of other great powers, I am afraid it would be equivalent to angering that great existence.

"If that's the case, don't apprentice to others in the future, if it's really like guessing, won't I anger that future master?" Ye Tian thought to himself.

He had already planned that unless he was accepted as an apprentice by a transcendent being, he could no longer apprentice, otherwise it would be too dangerous.

The spirit is also waiting for Allah Qilin, but it can't wait, it seems that Allah Qilin has completely abandoned this Qilin Hall, and he can't even get in touch.

"Ahem, assessor, you have passed through the sixth world, and you were originally going to apprentice, but now that something goes wrong, then you can only be given some benefits. However, just now the master has made it clear that he wants to accept you as an apprentice, maybe there is something delayed on the master's side. So be it, I'm in charge of giving you the highest reward. "

The machine spirit said.

"Thank you, Lord Machine!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Whoa!!

One treasure after another was taken out by the machine spirit and presented in front of Ye Tian.

A large number of top-level elixirs, a top-level attack-type Chaos Spirit Treasure, a top-level defensive Chaos Spirit Treasure, and a top-level speed-type defensive spirit treasure, some spells, a Origin Thing, a great supernatural power, plus three top-level inheritances.

"These treasures are for you!"

Instrument Spirit Dao.

Ye Tian gladly accepted it and put it all away, but he didn't check it carefully, he was going to wait until he left the Qilin Hall to check it.

After collecting these treasures, Ye Tian left with the help of the machine spirit.

After Ye Tian left, the machine spirit said worriedly: "The master can't be contacted, could it be that he is in danger?"

As everyone knows, Qilin Allah is now extremely afraid, where dare to enter this universe, for fear of angering that great existence again, so he no longer accepts the summons of this Qilin Hall, and even takes the initiative to give up this Qilin Hall.
